---
title: "Ken Osumi"
subtitle: "タンパク質言語モデルの内部表現を読み、残基レベルの分子機構仮説を立てる。"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

[プロフィール](about.qmd) · [English](../index.qmd){data-langpref="en"} · [GitHub](https://github.com/ken-osumi)
